title: CLATSOP COUNTY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE CLATSOP COUNTY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF County crisis line providing support for people experiencing mental health challenges, thoughts of suicide, and other crises. 115 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 325-5724 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (503) 325-5724 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE
